TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Fata' an ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,988 buwan, 5,474 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 2,968 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 2,506 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 50%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Fata' an hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Fata' an hya' ga Laso'ay. tay 'llaw na Fata' an hya' ga Tafalong. qryum qani gu nyux wahan maki' na kkmamay ru kk'ma. cyux qwis na gong qu qalang rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. pqwasan biru seneng maki 1 pqwasan biru seneng. pqwsan biru krahu maki 1 pqwsan biru krahu. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh spyangan na pinbahu singut
S.PHON: alaŇč *ata Ē an …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu koŇčő≤u …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *,*** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, tajan *%, truku *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a las~…ēo Ēaj. taj Ēllaw na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a ta*aloŇč. qrjum qani …£u njux wańßan maki Ē na kkmamaj ru kk Ēma. ¶~ ®jux qwis~…ē na …£oŇč qu qalaŇč rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru s~…ēeneŇč maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru s~…ēeneŇč. pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu maki * pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu s~…ēiŇčut
S.FORM: alang Fata' an ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,988 buwan, 5,474 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 2,968 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 2,506 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 50%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Fata' an hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Fata' an hya' ga Laso'ay. tay 'llaw na Fata' an hya' ga Tafalong. qryum qani gu nyux wahan maki' na kkmamay ru kk'ma. cyux qwis na gong qu qalang rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. pqwasan biru seneng maki 1 pqwasan biru seneng. pqwsan biru krahu maki 1 pqwsan biru krahu. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh spyangan na pinbahu singut
S.PHON: alaŇč *ata Ē an …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu koŇčő≤u …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *,*** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, tajan *%, truku *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj Ēzil na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a las~…ēo Ēaj. taj Ēllaw na *ata Ē an ńßja Ē …£a ta*aloŇč. qrjum qani …£u njux wańßan maki Ē na kkmamaj ru kk Ēma. ¶~ ®jux qwis~…ē na …£oŇč qu qalaŇč rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru s~…ēeneŇč maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru s~…ēeneŇč. pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu maki * pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu s~…ēiŇčut
